nasb.text: And the tempter came and said to Him, “If You are the Son of God, command that these stones become bread.”

esv.text: And the tempter came and said to him, “If you are the Son of God, command these stones to become loaves of bread.”

cnv.text: 試探者前來對他說：“你若是　神的兒子，就吩咐這些石頭變成食物吧！”

ccb.text: 试探者前来对祂说：“如果你是上帝的儿子，可以叫这些石头变成食物。”

csbs.text: 那试探者前来对他说：“你如果是神的儿子，就吩咐这些石头变成食物吧！”
